-- BUG FIX retroactivo Rata Maravillada:
-- 1. Corregir fecha de la reserva (era 2026-03-29, debe ser 2026-07-01)
UPDATE reservations SET booking_date = '2026-07-01' WHERE id = 450005;

-- 2. Crear booking operativo (faltaba)
INSERT INTO bookings (bookingNumber, experienceId, quoteId, clientName, clientEmail, clientPhone, scheduledDate, numberOfPersons, totalAmount, status, notes, reservationId, sourceChannel)
VALUES (
  'BK-RETRO-RATA-2026',
  0,
  420003,
  'Rata Marravillada',
  'jgrande@skicenter.es',
  '693026894',
  '2026-07-01 10:00:00',
  1,
  54.45,
  'confirmado',
  'Booking retroactivo — Pago CRM confirmado — Day Pass Náyade — Reparación BUG v25.24',
  450005,
  'otro'
);

-- 3. Crear transacción contable (faltaba)
INSERT INTO transactions (transactionNumber, type, amount, currency, paymentMethod, status, description, processedAt, clientName, clientEmail, clientPhone, productName, saleChannel, taxBase, taxAmount, reavMargin, fiscalRegime, reservationId, invoiceNumber, reservationRef, operationStatus)
VALUES (
  'TX-RETRO-RATA-2026',
  'ingreso',
  '54.45',
  'EUR',
  'otro',
  'completado',
  'Pago CRM — Presupuesto Nayade Experiences - Rata Marravillada — Reparación retroactiva BUG v25.24',
  NOW(),
  'Rata Marravillada',
  'jgrande@skicenter.es',
  '693026894',
  'Day Pass Náyade — Un día completo en el lago',
  'crm',
  '45.00',
  '9.45',
  '0.00',
  'general_21',
  450005,
  'FAC-2026-0001',
  'RES-MNCBJXCW',
  'confirmada'
);
